'''Womp Rats squad''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] military unit consisting of eight veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. They had orders to retrieve an unknown object after the [[Battle of Taul|Battle]] of [[Taul/Legends|Taul]]. They participated in the subsequent [[skirmish on Taul]], and the members of the squad were armed with [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbines]]. One member of the squad was a [[Specialist/Legends|specialist]] who carried [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]].<ref name="RT" />

The group continued to exist until the time of [[Second Imperial Civil War]].
